General.Name: China Properties Investment Holdings Ltd
General.Description: China Properties Investment Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the money lending and property investment businesses in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. It also provides agency and property development services, as well as financial services. The company was formerly known as Northern International Holdings Ltd. and changed its name to China Properties Investment Holdings Limited in November 2007. China Properties Investment Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: China Resources Building, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
